steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The text has two independent clauses on either side of the blank: the first is 'San Juan High School... Utah schools that have...', and the second is 'An enormous geoglyph...'. Both are full sentences that stand independently.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for independent clauses
steps.content: A period is required to separate two independent clauses that form separate sentences. Choice A uses a period, correctly separating the two full sentences. The other choices use commas, which violate the rule for sentence boundaries. That matches choice A — A is correct.
